content: A pellet of mass 1 g is moving with an angular velocity of 1 rad/s along a circle of radius 1 m. The centrifugal force is
explanation:
$$m = 1 \times {10^{ - 3}}$$;

$$\omega$$ = 1 rad/s;

$$r = 1$$ m

Centrifugal force $$ = m{\omega ^2}r = {10^{ - 3}}$$ N

1 newton = 105 dyne

$$\therefore$$ Centrifugal force = 100 dyne
